title: Agartha Villager
description: Agartha villagers are now in Minecraft!
body:
**Ever wanted to have Agartha villagers in Minecraft? Then this resource pack is for you!
This resource pack changes the texture of villagers — every villager will look like this.**

![Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34f9435710634153600d0237a69af006f526606f.png)

_Supports Fresh Animations_
